originalTitle: PlayStation State of Play June 2026: All the news and trailers
summary: While the majority of Summer Game Fest takes place over the weekend, Sony is getting a jump on things with its next State of Play showcase, which airs on June 2nd at 5PM ET. It’s coming at a pivotal time for the PlayStation brand: The PS5 keeps getting more expensive and Sony’s big bet on […]
content: While the majority of Summer Game Fest takes place over the weekend, Sony is getting a jump on things with its next State of Play showcase, which airs on June 2nd at 5PM ET. It’s coming at a pivotal time for the PlayStation brand: The PS5 keeps getting more expensive and Sony’s big bet on live-service games has largely fallen flat. A good showing at SGF won’t fix everything, but it could help show that PlayStation is on the right path moving forward. For its part, Sony says its latest State of Play will feature “more than 60 minutes of updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world.” The only confirmed part of the event’s lineup is Wolverine, from Spider-Man developer Insomniac, which is slated to launch in September. But given the length of the stream, there’ll be plenty more detailed. Maybe we’ll see the just-announced third expansion for The Witcher 3, or the long-awaited final installment of the Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy, or some more of Intergalactic, the next big project from The Last of Us developer Naughty Dog. It’s also likely the event will provide some insight into the uncertain future of Marathon. Whatever Sony shows, you can watch along on YouTube or Twitch, or follow along with the latest developments right here. And for everything announced at the rest of Summer Game Fest, be sure to check out our event hub. [Media: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cvh0xXmu0bs]
chineseTitle: PlayStation State of Play 2026 年 6 月：所有新闻和预告片
chineseSummary: 虽然夏季游戏节的大部分活动都在周末举行，但索尼在下一场 State of Play 展示活动中取得了领先地位，该展示活动将于美国东部时间 6 月 2 日下午 5 点播出。它的出现正值 PlayStation 品牌的关键时刻：PS5 的价格不断上涨，索尼在 [...]
chineseContent: 虽然夏季游戏节的大部分活动都在周末举行，但索尼在下一场 State of Play 展示活动中取得了领先地位，该展示活动将于美国东部时间 6 月 2 日下午 5 点播出。它的出现正值 PlayStation 品牌的关键时刻：PS5 的价格不断上涨，而索尼在直播游戏上的大赌注基本上已经落空。在 SGF 上的出色表现并不能解决所有问题，但它可以帮助表明 PlayStation 正走在正确的道路上前进。索尼表示，其最新的《State of Play》将包含“来自世界各地顶级工作室的超过 60 分钟的更新、公告和游戏玩法展示”。该活动阵容中唯一确认的部分是《蜘蛛侠》开发商 Insomniac 的《金刚狼》，该游戏预计于 9 月推出。但考虑到直播的长度，将会有更多的细节。也许我们会看到刚刚宣布的《巫师 3》第三部资料片，或者期待已久的《最终幻想 VII》重制三部曲的最后一部，或者《最后生还者》开发商顽皮狗的下一个大型项目《星际银河》的更多内容。此次活动也可能让人们对马拉松不确定的未来有一些了解。无论索尼展示什么，您都可以在 YouTube 或 Twitch 上观看，或者在此处关注最新动态。对于夏季游戏节其余时间宣布的所有内容，请务必查看我们的活动中心。 [媒体：https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cvh0xXmu0bs]
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
